evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensuring data traceability and quality; Implementing data quality testing and validation processes
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, testing, and traceability are core responsibilities with multiple rigour signals.
evidence.domain_risk: Healthcare/doctor marketplace platform with internal analytics focus
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Healthcare sector typically high-risk, but JD focuses on internal analytics without explicit compliance/regulatory language, classifying as moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Defining standardized metrics and KPIs; dbt models with testing
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established analytics layer with standardized metrics and governance suggests mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Designing dbt models; Constructing optimized SQL queries; Implementing data quality testing
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical methodology (dbt modeling, testing, macros, BigQuery) indicates hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: business teams to translate requirements; analytical models; dashboards
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data platform focus serving business consumers, placing this as internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Ownership verbs (designing, defining, implementing) indicate strategic responsibility for data layer.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, LLM-based features, or AI data infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Implementing data quality testing and validation processes
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and data quality are owned responsibilities, not just tools listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: ensuring data traceability and quality; data quality testing and validation processes
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: data quality and traceability language dominates, reflecting concern about data accuracy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building and maintaining the analytical data layer; Defining standardized metrics
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Scale and standardization focus suggests fix_scale posture.
